title: DIMORPHISM IN SULPHANILYLBENZAMIDE DERIVATVES
author: U. P. BASU
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Alkyl derivatives of sulphanilylbenzamide exist in dimorphic forms. Method of isolation and general properties have been recorded.
steps_raw: Alkyl derivatives of sulphanilylbenzamide exist in dimorphic forms. Method of isolation and general properties have been recorded.
